Off Calendar Aug-20-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
CLAY R. SIDES, Esq., LAW OFFICES OF CLAY R. SIDES (760) 723-2275 claysides@aol.com
Attorney for Plaintiff, AUSTIN DAVIS ROSAS
Deborah S. Kerr, Esq., BREMER WHYTE BROWN & OMEARA LLP (602) 274-1204 Attorney for Specially Appearing Defendant, Moawya Haroun Yagob

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MOAWYA YAGOBs MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS

Defendant Moawya Haroun Yagob's motion to quash for lack of personal jurisdiction is granted.

(see word minutes for complete details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Coourts ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Visiting Judge: John M. True; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/JMT)
